'''wodalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:pubofemoral|pubofemoral]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-d-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pubofemoral|pubofemoral]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wodalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wodalithi|wodalithi]] || [[word:wodaliji|wodaliji]] || [[word:wodalishi|wodalishi]] || [[word:wodaliki|wodaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wodaluthuthu|wodaluthuthu]] || [[word:wodalujuju|wodalujuju]] || [[word:wodalushushu|wodalushushu]] || [[word:wodalukuku|wodalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wodaluthu|wodaluthu]] || [[word:wodaluju|wodaluju]] || [[word:wodalushu|wodalushu]] || [[word:wodaluku|wodaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wodalufthuf|wodalufthuf]] || [[word:wodalufjuf|wodalufjuf]] || [[word:wodalufshuf|wodalufshuf]] || [[word:wodalufkuf|wodalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wodalethe|wodalethe]] || [[word:wodaleje|wodaleje]] || [[word:wodaleshe|wodaleshe]] || [[word:wodaleke|wodaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wodalothotho|wodalothotho]] || [[word:wodalojojo|wodalojojo]] || [[word:wodaloshosho|wodaloshosho]] || [[word:wodalokoko|wodalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wodalotho|wodalotho]] || [[word:wodalojo|wodalojo]] || [[word:wodalosho|wodalosho]] || [[word:wodaloko|wodaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wodalofthof|wodalofthof]] || [[word:wodalofjof|wodalofjof]] || [[word:wodalofshof|wodalofshof]] || [[word:wodalofkof|wodalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wodalĂŻfthĂŻf|wodalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:wodalĂŻfjĂŻf|wodalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:wodalĂŻfshĂŻf|wodalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:wodalĂŻfkĂŻf|wodalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wodalĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|wodalĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:wodalĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|wodalĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:wodalĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|wodalĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:wodalĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|wodalĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wodalĂŻfthĂŻf|wodalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:wodalĂŻfjĂŻf|wodalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:wodalĂŻfshĂŻf|wodalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:wodalĂŻfkĂŻf|wodalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wodalĂŻfthĂŻf|wodalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:wodalĂŻfjĂŻf|wodalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:wodalĂŻfshĂŻf|wodalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:wodalĂŻfkĂŻf|wodalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wodalĂŠthĂŠ|wodalĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:wodalĂŠjĂŠ|wodalĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:wodalĂŠshĂŠ|wodalĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:wodalĂŠkĂŠ|wodalĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wodalathatha|wodalathatha]] || [[word:wodalajaja|wodalajaja]] || [[word:wodalashasha|wodalashasha]] || [[word:wodalakaka|wodalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wodalatha|wodalatha]] || [[word:wodalaja|wodalaja]] || [[word:wodalasha|wodalasha]] || [[word:wodalaka|wodalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wodalafthaf|wodalafthaf]] || [[word:wodalafjaf|wodalafjaf]] || [[word:wodalafshaf|wodalafshaf]] || [[word:wodalafkaf|wodalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:wodalasha|wodalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:wodalshĂ«sha|wodalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wodalrosha|wodalrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wodalmusha|wodalmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:wodalyasha|wodalyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowodalnkshĂ«sha|gowodalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowodalnkrosha|gowodalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowodalnkmusha|gowodalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowodalnkyasha|gowodalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:wodadalasha|wodadalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wodadalshĂ«sha|wodadalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wodadalrosha|wodadalrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wodadalmusha|wodadalmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wodadalyasha|wodadalyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowodadalnkshĂ«sha|gowodadalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowodadalnkrosha|gowodadalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowodadalnkmusha|gowodadalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowodadalnkyasha|gowodadalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:wedĂŠlasha|wedĂŠlasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wedĂŠlshĂ«sha|wedĂŠlshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wedĂŠlrosha|wedĂŠlrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wedĂŠlmusha|wedĂŠlmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wedĂŠlyasha|wedĂŠlyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowedĂŠlnkshĂ«sha|gowedĂŠlnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowedĂŠlnkrosha|gowedĂŠlnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowedĂŠlnkmusha|gowedĂŠlnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowedĂŠlnkyasha|gowedĂŠlnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:wodfalasha|wodfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wodfalshĂ«sha|wodfalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wodfalrosha|wodfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wodfalmusha|wodfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wodfalyasha|wodfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowodfalnkshĂ«sha|gowodfalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowodfalnkrosha|gowodfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowodfalnkmusha|gowodfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowodfalnkyasha|gowodfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
